title: My Master Satan: 3 Tales of Drug Fueled Violence
overview: My Master Satan is the shot on VHS  horror/crime/dark humor anthology film by Denver  auteur filmmaker Dakota Ray.  My Master Satan features three interconnected tales  revolving around serial killer/druggie Alister (Dakota Ray) & his equally demented serial killer friends Woody, Charlie, Bubba, Dealin' Dick & takes the viewer deep into a seedy underworld of crime, drugs and murder.
